title: My Best Dividend Aristocrats For October 2022
text: NOBL fell 2.78% in August which brings the Funds return for the year to a loss of 9.16%. Thus far, through September 23rd, the dividend aristocrat ETF is down 6.71%, bringing its year-to-date return to -15.25%.

title: Sherwin-Williams: After A 30%+ Retreat, Future Returns Look Much Brighter
text: Sherwin-Williams is a Dividend Champion with 43 consecutive years of dividend growth. Shares currently yield 1.01%. Sherwin-Williams is a leader in the paints and specialty coatings industry focused primarily on the Americas.
